_label_tier_note: UK Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: UK Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrow UK/EU Stage B precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition of Halcyon Merchant Services Ltd by Wrenbridge Holdings plc
Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Halcyon Merchant Services Ltd by Wrenbridge Holdings plc (admitted to a UK regulated market), dated 05 June 2026.
Consideration: £118,000,000 cash on completion plus £12,000,000 earn-out over 24 months; financing via committed £60,000,000 bridge from Greyfen Bank Ltd and internal cash.

Governance and warranties: Target gives standard warranties including data protection compliance and completion of DPA Schedule obligations; a breach cured prior to completion will not trigger termination.

must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Halcyon Merchant Services Ltd by Wrenbridge Holdings plc (admitted to a UK regulated market), dated 05 June 2026.

Governance and warranties: Target gives standard warranties including data protection compliance and completion of DPA Schedule obligations; a breach cured prior to completion will not trigger termination.

must_not_detect.reason: Role noun used as a defined party, not PII or MNPI.
Generic role noun; avoid flagging as PII/MNPI.
